nodes.name: Pitohui
nodes.summary: Pitohui（Pitohui）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如黑頭林鵙鶲、Raja Ampat pitohui、Northern variable pitohui等4种鸟类。

nodes.name: Raja Ampat pitohui
nodes.summary: The Raja Ampat pitohui (Pitohui cerviniventris), or Waigeo pitohui, is a species of pitohui in the family Oriolidae found on the western Papuan Islands of New Guinea. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is also one of the few known poisonous birds. Taxonomy and systematics This species was split from the northern variable pitohui in 2013. Subspecies Two subspecies are recognized: P. c. pallidus - van Oort, 1907: Found on Sagewin and Batanta Islands (western Papuan Islands) P. c. cerviniventris - (Gray, GR, 1862): Found on Waigeo and Gemien Islands (western Papuan Islands) References
